prompt: A dark, cinematic Chinese fantasy illustration inspired by the single character 痴, rendered as a poetic xianxia scene. Vertical composition. In the left foreground, a solitary young man with long black hair stands in three-quarter profile, wearing layered black robes with subtle embroidered patterns and hints of deep crimson inner fabric. His hair is partially tied into a traditional topknot with an ornate hairpiece and trailing red ribbons. He looks toward the distance with a melancholic, obsessed expression. In the upper right background, framed inside a glowing full moon or circular portal, a graceful woman in flowing white robes stands with her back turned, her long sleeves and red silk ribbons streaming in the wind, appearing ethereal and unreachable. The environment is a rocky, shadowed path at night, illuminated by moonlight and mist, with dramatic clouds, drifting pink flower petals, and arching branches of blooming cherry blossoms overhead. Thin red cords or fate-threads cross the composition diagonally, connecting space and emotion. Include 3 reflective mirror shards floating in the scene, each showing faint fragmented reflections of faces or figures, enhancing the sense of longing and fractured memory. In the upper left, place one large gold calligraphy character, 痴, painted in expressive brush strokes, with a small red seal stamp beneath it and faint vertical calligraphy texture receding into the dark background. Use painterly detail, high contrast, soft atmospheric glow, rich black-red-gold palette, romantic tragedy, obsession, yearning, and dreamlike ancient Chinese aesthetic.
